headline: Johor Bahru Flooding Displaces 85,000 in December Event
context: December 2025 floods in Johor Bahru displaced 85,000 residents across 12 affected neighbourhoods with RM1.2 billion in damages.

cards.big: 85,000 displaced in JB December 2025 floods with RM1.2 billion damages
cards.sub: 12 neighbourhoods flooded after 380mm rainfall in 6 hours overwhelmed drainage

cards.big: Same areas flooded in 2022 and 2023 despite RM280 million remediation works
cards.sub: Drainage upgrade designed for 100-year event exceeded by 3rd flood in 4 years

cards.big: 12,000 vehicles submerged with average RM25,000 damage per vehicle
cards.sub: Insurance industry paid RM480 million in JB flood claims in December alone

cards.big: 5,000 small businesses reported average losses of RM85,000 each
cards.sub: Federal disaster relief of RM35 million covered only 3% of total damages

cards.big: Repeat flooding tests whether infrastructure design standards match current climate reality
85,000 displaced in Johor flooding. Repeated displacement means mitigation infrastructure has failed structurally.
